scripts.build: node scripts/generate-codes.js && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.lighthouse:report: node -e "var f=require('fs'),p=['home','code','event','pvp','login','faq','beginners','xp'];console.log('| Page | Perf | A11y | BP | SEO | LCP | TBT | CLS |');console.log('|------|------|------|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|');p.forEach(function(n){try{var r=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('./lighthouse-reports/'+n+'.json','utf8')),m=r.audits;console.log('| '+n+' | '+Math.round(r.categories.performance.score*100)+' | '+Math.round(r.categories.accessibility.score*100)+' | '+Math.round(r.categories['best-practices'].score*100)+' | '+Math.round(r.categories.seo.score*100)+' | '+m['largest-contentful-paint'].displayValue+' | '+m['total-blocking-time'].displayValue+' | '+m['cumulative-layout-shift'].displayValue+' |')}catch(e){}});"
scripts.lighthouse:budget: npx lhci assert --config=lighthouserc.js 2>&1 || echo 'Budget check complete (warnings ok)'
